title: Bagel's Reusable Vaults
description: Reuse the same trial chamber vault and ominous vault as many times as you desire.
body:
Allows you to use keys to get loot multiple times from the same trial chamber vaults and ominous vaults.

Saves you from having to find and travel to many trial chambers for rare loot such as the heavy core.

Supports multiplayer.

Made for Java 1.21.6.
